Execution Guidelines
- Work through each checklist item systematically and update progress as you go.
- Avoid verbose explanations or printing full command outputs; state if a step is skipped.
- Use '.' as the working directory unless specified otherwise; do not create new folders unless requested (except .vscode/tasks if ever needed).
- Avoid adding media or external links unless explicitly requested; use placeholders only with a note to replace.
- Task completion requires: scaffolded and compiled project, this instructions file present, README up to date, clear debug/launch guidance provided.
